title: Borrowed value does not live long enough
explanation: This error occurs when a borrowed value is dropped while a reference to it still exists. The borrow checker ensures that all references are valid for their entire lifetime.
error_message: error[E0597]: `s` does not live long enough

fixes.description: Move the value to the outer scope
Clone or own the value instead of borrowing

tip: Think about which scope owns the data. References can never outlive the data they point to.
